mapper.select: SELECT f.id, f.friend_id, f.remark, f.group_id, f.status, f.create_time, u.username, u.nickname, u.avatar, fg.name as group_name, DATE_FORMAT(f.create_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as create_time_str FROM friend f LEFT JOIN user u ON f.friend_id = u.id LEFT JOIN friend_group fg ON f.group_id = fg.id WHERE f.user_id = #{userId} AND f.status = 1 ORDER BY fg.sort ASC, f.create_time DESC

SELECT u.id, u.username, u.nickname, u.avatar, CASE WHEN f.id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END as is_friend FROM user u LEFT JOIN friend f ON u.id = f.friend_id AND f.user_id = #{userId} AND f.status = 1 WHERE u.id != #{userId} AND u.status = 1 AND ( u.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.email LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ) ORDER BY u.create_time DESC

SELECT f.id, f.friend_id, f.remark, f.group_id, f.status, f.create_time, u.username, u.nickname, u.avatar, fg.name as group_name, DATE_FORMAT(f.create_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as create_time_str FROM friend f LEFT JOIN user u ON f.friend_id = u.id LEFT JOIN friend_group fg ON f.group_id = fg.id WHERE f.user_id = #{userId} AND f.friend_id = #{friendId} AND f.status = 1 LIMIT 1
